[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000000 a
1 0000000000 a
2 0000000000 a
3 0000000000 a
4 0000000000 a
5 0000000000 a
6 0000000010 1
7 0000010001 2

01 10 1110011101 7
12 21 1111010010 6
23 32 0101001010 4
34 43 0010010010 3
45 54 0000000011 2
56 65 0000010001 2 match 7
67 76 1001001111 6
70 07 1111001010 6

02 20 0001001111 5
13 31 1010011000 4
24 42 0111011000 5
35 53 0010010001 3
46 64 0000010010 2
57 75 1001011110 6
60 06 0110000101 4
71 17 0001010111 5

03 30 0100000101 3
14 41 1000001010 3
25 52 0111011011 7
36 63 0010000000 1
47 74 1001011101 6
50 05 0110010100 4
61 16 1000011000 3
72 27 1110000101 5

04 40 0110010111 6
15 51 1000001001 3
26 62 0111001010 5
37 73 1011001111 7
